title: mutisia latifolia f. bracteata
intro: Mutisia latifolia f. bracteata is a plant species within the Mutisia genus, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is often used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as aiding in wound healing, reducing fever, and providing relief from digestive issues. Mutisia latifolia f. bracteata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine.
